name: File Read
description: Read the contents of a file at a given path. Returns the full text content with optional line range filtering for large files.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: File path to read (relative to project root or absolute)

parameters.name: lineRange
parameters.description: Restrict output to a specific line range

properties.name: end
properties.description: End line (inclusive). Use -1 for end of file.

outputDescription: File content as a string. When lineRange is specified, only the requested lines are returned with line numbers prefixed.
author: openspace
